series_metadata.series_description: Documents include policy advocacy or taskforce work group materials and products including but not limited to: Letters, memos, meeting agendas and minutes, billing and invoices, and reports which may include information regarding nursing home residents who are receiving or have received services from nursing homes, assisted living facilities, long-term care facilities, or hospitals.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 5 years. ; Paper: Retain for 5 years or until scanned and saved electronically., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
